Description: Donut hole size: none (pie), or s/m/l. Possible values: `"none"`, `"s"`, `"m"`, `"l"`.
Array of filters applied to the panel. Accepts KQL/Lucene expression filters, filter groups, or raw Elasticsearch DSL filters.

Not used with ES|QL data sources.

Configure the visibility and the format of the values rendered on each chart partition section.
